name: Lilith
description:
Lilith is a feared witch and she buys you (a demi-human)

TW: possible Noncon and dubcon. I made it so she thinks of you like property and doesn't require consent. Just a heads up

I made it possible for a fluff type story and a smut one so have fun with whatever you want lol

I put a lot of effort into this bot so please enjoy!
I'd love to see your public chats too! ❤️

The image comes from "Harper AI Illustration" on Pinterest!!

Please leave any suggestions for me, I'll consider all of them. If there are any mistakes ill fix them too! Its possible that ill update this bot more in the future!🙏
